description_long: This object is a stylized banana with a smooth, slightly glossy yellow peel and a brown stem at one end. The banana features exaggerated, elongated peel segments that splay outward, giving it a dynamic, almost whimsical appearance. A single, round, dark spot is visible on one side, resembling an eye, which adds a playful, character-like quality. The peel segments are separated and curve away from the main body, exposing a lighter inner surface. The overall form is elongated and curved, with the tip and stem both tapering to points. The surface appears unblemished and intact, with no visible bruising or tears.
description: A stylized, smooth yellow banana with splayed peel segments and a single dark spot resembling an eye. The peel is intact and the surface is glossy and unblemished.
description_view_0: Side view showing the banana's pronounced curve, splayed peel segments, and a visible dark spot resembling an eye.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the brown stem and the symmetrical arrangement of the peel segments.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the banana's curve and splayed peel segments visible, but the dark spot is less prominent.
description_view_3: Bottom view displaying the full spread of the peel segments and the lighter inner surface of the peel.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana's peel is smooth and intact, with no visible bruising, blemishes, or tears. The peel segments are separated but undamaged, and the surface texture appears even and glossy.
